comment: "I found the course most interesting because it clearly explained how to protect key parts, the difference between general and critical aseptic fields, and why maintaining sterility is essential for patient safety. The practical examples, step-by-step procedures, and real clinical applications helped make the concepts easy to understand and apply in practice."

"The course was informative and well-structured. It helped reinforce the importance of aseptic technique in clinical practice. I appreciate the interactive quizzes and clear explanations. Thank you for the learning opportunity!"
"I found the practical applications and real-world examples most interesting. They helped me understand how the concepts can be applied effectively."
"I found the length very appropriate, and coming from New Zealand, found the slight differences in policy interesting."
"I found all aspects of this course very interesting as there were parts that I did not know about and have learnt new aspects."
"This course was engaging and to the point, I will be sending other team members to this site to do it."
